title: Trace Success Criteria through Acceptance Checks and Evidence
outOfScope: Product source code outside Contract/Summary governance
Bootstrap lifecycle and release state machine

sources.reason: Work Item 6 Success to Acceptance to Check to Evidence objective.
Existing Acceptance mapping policy and compatibility boundary.
Summary verification evidence validation entry point.

riskAssessment.reason: The change tightens mapping evidence while preserving historic v1 readability.

executionDecision.reason: Mapping rules, compatibility, and verification evidence are declared.

preReviewWarnings: Review Acceptance ID completeness, executed verification binding, and historic v1 compatibility.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A1: Every v2 Acceptance item uses a stable identifier and maps exactly once in Summary acceptanceEvidence.
A2: Each evidence mapping references an existing repository-relative path and passed Verification ID.
A3: Missing IDs, duplicate mappings, unexecuted checks, and malformed evidence are rejected while historic v1 remains readable.
A4: Focused tests and Contract field documentation cover the mapping boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Verification results prove that checks ran but do not by themselves prove which Acceptance criterion they support or whether the referenced evidence executed.
constraints: Keep historic v1 archive validation read-only compatible.
Evidence paths must be repository-relative and machine-portable.
Do not claim an Acceptance is complete from command presence alone.
intent.rationale: Explicit mapping makes each Acceptance auditable without replacing the registered Verification command model.

rawUserRequest: 继续执行第 6 个工单：建立 Success → Acceptance → Check → Evidence 正式追踪，识别缺证据和 Digest 不匹配。

declaredIntent.summary: Make Acceptance evidence mappings explicit and tied to executed verification.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
